name: Big Number
when: One headline metric dominates the message
exampleTitle: Customer retention reached 94%, highest in 5 years

name: KPI Card Dashboard
when: 2-4 key metrics shown together with context
exampleTitle: Q4 shows 3 green, 1 amber — churn needs immediate action

name: Operational-KPI (Reliability Metrics)
when: Target comparison + trend for uptime, SLA, system reliability
exampleTitle: 99.97% uptime exceeds SLA target, zero critical incidents in Q4

name: Column/Bar Chart
when: Comparing values across categories or showing trends
exampleTitle: Revenue growth reaccelerating after Q2 restructure

name: Chart + Insight Callout
when: Data visualization needs a 'so what' annotation
exampleTitle: Market share gains concentrated in enterprise segment

name: Framework (2×2, Venn, Value Chain)
when: Organizing concepts, showing relationships, strategic positioning
exampleTitle: Prioritize high-impact, low-effort items in the upper-right quadrant

name: Simple Table
when: Comparing structured data, financials, feature matrices
exampleTitle: Feature comparison shows Platform B leads on 4 of 6 criteria

name: Waterfall Chart
when: Showing how a value builds up or breaks down step by step
exampleTitle: Three factors drove the $12M cost increase

name: Comparison Slide
exampleTitle: Platform A outperforms on cost, but B is stronger on scalability

name: Timeline/Roadmap
exampleTitle: A two-wave plan captures quick wins now and de-risks change

name: Process Diagram
when: Showing a workflow, decision flow, or transformation
exampleTitle: Current process breaks at 3 handoffs, adding 5 days

name: Executive Summary
when: Opening or closing a section with key findings
exampleTitle: Three priorities will drive growth in 2027

name: Recommendations / Next Steps
exampleTitle: Three initiatives to launch in Q3

name: Quote Slide
when: Adding a human voice, customer testimony, or expert opinion
exampleTitle: 300% ROI in 8 months validates platform as growth driver

name: Map Slide
when: Geographic distribution, market presence, expansion plans
exampleTitle: EMEA expansion complete — APAC launch in Q2

name: Appendix
when: Backup data that supports but doesn't drive the narrative

name: Title Slide
when: Opening slide with strategic framing for investor, cost, ESG, launch, or integration presentations
exampleTitle: Path to $500M ARR — AI-led expansion strategy

name: Evidence Design
when: Cross-cutting guidance for supporting quantitative claims with visual proof
